strategy: Avoid DoT spells on Leadite. A damage-over-time makes him chain Chromatic Blast, Frenzy, and Iron Curse, so use direct-damage hits.
Killing Leadite spawns two Uraniumites, and each Uraniumite killed spawns two Protactimites, so plan an AoE-heavy finish to clear the cascade rather than leaving stragglers.
Blade up and hit with Life (he takes +30%, resists Death 66% and everything else 36%).
Save AoE for the add waves after he dies.
cheatNotes: Hitting him with a DoT makes him chain Chromatic Blast, Frenzy, and Iron Curse, so stick to direct damage.
Defeating him spawns two Uraniumites, so be ready with AoE for the next wave.
Each Uraniumite you kill spawns two Protactimites, so clear them together with AoE to avoid an endless cascade.
